heroHeadline: Trump: 'Why Would We Be There For Them?' — Sharpest Article 5 Doubts Yet as All 32 Allies Hit 2% for First Time
heroSubtitle: Trump's Miami forum broadside and 'USA needs nothing from NATO' Truth Social posts represent the most explicit presidential questioning of Article 5 ever, as The Telegraph reports a US 'pay-to-play' proposal to strip Article 5 from non-5% spenders — arriving on the same day Rutte declared all 32 members met the 2% target for the first time in alliance history
footerNote: Data sourced from NATO HQ, White House, Washington Post, Bloomberg, Reuters, Financial Times, Stars and Stripes, Euronews, The Telegraph, Political Wire, ECFR, Brookings Institution, German Marshall Fund
